title: Carry the Innovation Forward
description: In collaboration with Duke faculty, a total of 4 projects across divisions received the grant from Duke Learning Innovation and/or Duke Kunshan Office of Academic Affairs. Design-it-yourself Lab for Physics EducationKai Huang Empower Written Corrective Feedback on L2 Chinese Writing with TurnitinXiaofei Pan Industry 4.0 Open Education Resource Publication InitiativesLuyao Zhang Participatory Learning in Virtual EnvironmentsVivian Xu, Benjamin Bacon
